title: Festive and Fluffy Algerian Fast Action Yeast Dumplings
description: A festive and briny Algerian dish featuring fast action yeast, perfect for special occasions. The combination of spices and seafood creates a unique and delicious flavor profile.
instructions: Combine flour, salt, and fast action yeast in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add warm water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and shape each piece into a ball.
Heat a non-stick iron teppan over medium heat and add a small amount of olive oil.
Add 4-5 dumplings to the teppan and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
While the dumplings are cooking, heat the butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
Add the caramelized fennel, anchovies, black pepper, smoked paprika, and lemon juice to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Serve the dumplings with the fennel-anchovy sauce and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
